home.heroDescription: I help businesses move faster — from Fortune 500 platforms to AI-powered solutions for growing companies.
home.enterpriseDescription: I embed with engineering teams at scale — designing systems, leading frontend development, and shipping production code faster with AI. Complex platforms, delivered simply.
home.smallBusinessDescription: Enterprise-grade thinking, applied to businesses of every size. Modern websites, workflow automation, and digital strategy — all powered by AI for faster results at a fraction of the cost.
home.quote: I've spent a decade inside engineering teams at companies like Bell Canada and Wells Fargo. I bring that same rigor to every project — whether it's a corporate platform or a founder's first website.
home.ctaDescription: Whether you need a senior architect for your team or AI-powered solutions for your business.

services.enterpriseDescription: I join your team as a senior technical resource — designing systems, leading frontend development, and using AI to accelerate delivery. The kind of thinking that comes from building inside Fortune 500 engineering teams.
services.solutionArchDesc: System design and technical strategy aligned with business objectives.
services.frontendLeadDesc: Leading teams, establishing patterns, driving technical decisions.
services.aiDevDesc: Shipping production code faster without compromising quality.
services.platformDesc: Headless CMS architecture, multi-language platforms, cloud deployment.
services.smallBusinessTitle: Enterprise thinking, applied to your business.
services.strategyDescription: A focused deep-dive into your technology, workflows, and opportunities. Walk away with a clear, prioritized action plan.
services.websiteDescription: A modern, high-performance website built with AI — designed to convert, optimized to rank, delivered in weeks.
services.automationDescription: Identify what you're doing manually that AI can handle — then build the systems to make it happen.
services.retainerDescription: Ongoing support, maintenance, and optimization. Your technology partner on call.
services.notSureDescription: Book a strategy session. We'll look at where you are, where you want to be, and the fastest way to get there.

work.smallBusinessDescription: 8 years of helping entrepreneurs and small businesses build their digital presence — from community platforms to professional websites.
work.bellDescription: Architecting a bilingual corporate communications platform for one of Canada's largest telecommunications companies. Next.js, headless CMS, AWS — enterprise-scale, delivered with AI-accelerated workflows.
work.wellsDescription: Led frontend development across multiple projects at one of the world's largest financial institutions. Built reusable, data-driven component systems. Promoted from contractor to tech lead within the year.
work.sofarDescription: Built the ecommerce and event management platforms for a global live music community. Ticket purchasing, artist management, venue coordination — the full stack.
work.tauliaDescription: Full-stack development on supply chain finance software. Standalone React applications, agile teams, and the kind of fintech complexity that teaches you to build things right.
work.miscarriageMovement: A digital home for a community supporting those who've experienced pregnancy loss. Website and community platform built for connection and healing.
work.motherChapter: Helping moms navigate postpartum identity — a community platform designed with care, built for growth.
work.chrisRyan: A conversion-focused website for a fitness coaching business. Professional presence, clear path to booking.
work.notion: Clean, professional web presence for a consulting firm. Built to establish credibility and generate leads.
work.charell: Custom website for a creative professional. Personal brand, brought to life online.
work.steveChiger: Professional website with ongoing monthly support. Long-term partnership, continuously maintained.

about.bio1: I've spent over a decade building software — starting in fintech, moving through a global music platform, leading frontend teams at Wells Fargo, and now architecting enterprise platforms for Bell Canada.
about.bio2: Along the way, I spent eight years running my own web development business, helping entrepreneurs and small business owners — public relations agencies, authors, bakers, influencers, journalists, mothers — bring their ideas online. I've mentored developers, led engineering teams, and learned that the best technology is the kind that disappears into the background and just works.
about.bio3: Tatham Tech is where all of that comes together. Enterprise-level architecture. Small business empathy. AI-powered everything.
about.bio4: My first career was in animal science — turns out diagnosing livestock and debugging code aren't that different. In both cases, something's broken, nobody can tell you why, and the deadline was yesterday.
about.shipDescription: AI means faster delivery. I use it to cut timelines, not corners. You get production-quality work in a fraction of the time.
about.clarityDescription: The best solutions are the simplest ones. I design systems that are easy to understand, maintain, and build on.
about.bothSidesDescription: I've been the engineer inside the Fortune 500, and the freelancer across from the founder. That perspective changes how I build.
about.wantToWorkDescription: I'm always open to interesting projects and new connections.

contact.thankYouDescription: I'll be in touch within 1-2 business days.
contact.messagePlaceholder: A few sentences about your project or what you're looking for...

footer.description: AI-powered digital solutions built with over a decade of experience across enterprise and small business.
